pattern.name: macos_sidebar_layout
pattern.description: The standard application shell with a translucent sidebar.
pattern.structure: Use `App.svelte` to combine `Sidebar.svelte`, `Toolbar.svelte`, and `ContentArea.svelte`. Ensure sidebar leverages `rgba()` or specific tokens to support vibrancy where supported.

pattern.name: wizard_flow
pattern.description: Multi-step wizard for complex operations like Restore or Jailbreak.
pattern.structure: Use a state machine or a reactive `$state` variable (e.g., `currentStep = 1`) to toggle visibility of `WizardStep` components. Include a `WizardProgress` indicator.

pattern.name: tauri_ipc_invocation
pattern.description: Frontend API wrappers for calling Tauri commands.
pattern.structure: Keep IPC calls in `src/lib/api/` files. Use standard async/await to call `invoke('command_name')`. Catch and format errors to display in Toast notifications or inline alerts.
